notes: FLOPs are computed on the bare MONAI model with a single fp32 patch-shaped input tensor, not through the sliding-window inferer. MACs are reported as FLOPs/2. Per-volume estimates use the median patch count from 8 frozen test cases after resampling manifest shapes to [1.0, 1.0, 1.0] mm spacing with overlap=0.5. Arithmetic intensity uses FLOPs divided by fp32 trainable-parameter bytes plus leaf-module output activation bytes for one forward pass; this is a proxy, not a hardware roofline measurement.
